keys.import_formats: Supported formats: Standard (Key, OEM ID, Status) or Comprehensive (with usage history)

usb.title: USB Device Management
usb.detect_info: Click below to detect USB devices connected to this computer.
usb.device_name_desc: Friendly name to identify this device
usb.delete_confirm: Delete USB device "%s"?\n\nUSB authentication will be blocked for this device.
usb.max_devices: Technician has reached maximum allowed USB devices (%d)
usb.serial_exists: USB device with this serial number already registered: %s
usb.tech_inactive: Cannot register USB device for inactive technician
usb.click_device: Click on a device to use it for registration:
usb.device_explorer: Device appears in Windows File Explorer
usb.device_not_locked: Device is not locked or encrypted
usb.native_app_error: The native application may not be installed or properly configured.
usb.unexpected_error: An unexpected error occurred while accessing the Hardware Bridge.
usb.how_it_works_desc: Uses Hardware Bridge extension (best), WebUSB API, or PowerShell command.
usb.serial_warning_desc: WebUSB and WMI may report different serial numbers for the same device. For reliable USB authentication, use Hardware Bridge or PowerShell detection (both use WMI).
usb.method_webusb_desc: Browser-based USB detection (limited compatibility with flash drives)
usb.powershell_run_info: Copy and run this command in PowerShell to get your USB device's serial number:
usb.powershell_step1: 1. Press Win+X then A to open PowerShell as Admin
usb.powershell_step2: 2. Paste the command (Ctrl+V) and press Enter
usb.powershell_step3: 3. Copy the SerialNumber from the output
usb.powershell_step4: 4. Paste it into the "USB Serial Number" field below
usb.bridge_not_detected: The Hardware Bridge didn't detect any USB flash drives. Please ensure:
history.search_placeholder: Search by order number or key...
settings.title: System Settings
settings.alt_server_desc: Configure backup activation server for automatic failover or manual selection
settings.alt_server_desc2: Allow technicians to use or failover to alternative activation method
settings.script_path_desc: Full path to CMD script, PowerShell script, or executable
settings.pre_command_desc: Optional command to run before the script path. Use for downloading remote scripts (irm), HTTP fetching (curl.exe), or expression evaluation (iex). Leave empty for local file execution.
settings.timeout_desc: Maximum time allowed for alternative server script (30-600 seconds)
settings.prompt_desc: Ask technician to choose between OEM server and alternative server at startup
settings.auto_failover_desc: Automatically use alternative server when OEM key database runs out of available keys
settings.verify_activation_desc: Check Windows activation status after alternative server completes
settings.alt_server_required: Script path is required when alternative server is enabled
settings.language_desc: Default language for new users and login screens
twofa.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
twofa.desc: Secure your admin account with Google Authenticator or Authy
twofa.enabled_desc: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.
twofa.disabled_desc: Enable two-factor authentication for enhanced security.
twofa.requires_app: Requires Google Authenticator or Authy app on your phone
twofa.extra_security: Adds extra security layer beyond password
twofa.backup_recovery: Backup codes provided for account recovery
twofa.network_bypass: Network Bypass: 2FA skipped when logging in from trusted office network
twofa.qr_desc: Use Google Authenticator or Authy on your phone to scan this QR code:
twofa.verify_desc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to verify:
twofa.codes_desc: Store these codes safely. Each can only be used once if you lose access to your authenticator app.
twofa.disable_confirm: Are you sure you want to disable 2FA? This will reduce your account security.
twofa.regenerate_confirm: Generate new backup codes? This will invalidate all existing backup codes.
network.title: Trusted Networks Configuration
network.desc: Manage network subnets for 2FA bypass and USB authentication security
network.usb_auth_only: USB Authentication: Only allowed from networks with "Allow USB Auth" enabled
network.twofa_bypass: 2FA Bypass: Admins from trusted networks can skip TOTP verification
network.cidr_format: CIDR Format: Use format like 192.168.1.0/24 for entire subnet
network.office_networks: Office Networks: Only add networks you physically control
network.bypass_2fa_label: Bypass 2FA (Skip TOTP verification from this network)
network.delete_confirm: Delete trusted network "%s"?\n\nUSB authentication from this network will be blocked.
backup.title: Database Backups
backup.desc: Manage automated and manual database backups
backup.trigger_confirm: Trigger manual database backup now?\n\nThis may take a few minutes.

two_fa.status_desc_v2: Protect your account with an additional layer of security using a TOTP authenticator app.

compliance.qc_enabled_desc: Enable hardware compliance checking on all activations.
compliance.blocking_prevents_key_desc: Refuse key distribution when blocking compliance issues exist.
compliance.max_unallocated_mb_desc: Fail partition check if unallocated disk space exceeds this limit. Set to 0 to disable.
compliance.inherit_hint: Leave empty to inherit from manufacturer defaults or global settings.
compliance.unconfigured_desc: These manufacturers were detected but have no default rules.
compliance.no_manufacturers: No manufacturers detected yet. Motherboards will appear here after hardware collection.
compliance.global_defaults_hint: These are fallback defaults. Product lines can override per-line.
product_lines.qc_enforcement_hint: Set per-check enforcement for this product line. "Inherit" uses global defaults.
compliance.recheck_confirm_desc: This will re-run all QC compliance checks on {{count}} hardware records using current rules. Existing results will be replaced. Records are processed in batches of 50.
compliance.recheck_no_records: No hardware records found to recheck.
error.boundary_description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.
empty.keys: No keys found. Import a CSV file to add OEM keys.
empty.technicians: No technicians yet. Add your first technician to get started.
empty.history: No activation history. Records will appear once technicians activate keys.
empty.roles: No custom roles defined. Create a role to manage permissions.
empty.networks: No trusted networks configured. Add a network to allow admin access.
empty.backups: No backups found. Trigger a manual backup to create one.

hw.not_found: No hardware data found for this activation
integrations.desc: Connect external systems to sync data automatically.

product_lines.title: Product Lines
product_lines.subtitle: Manage product lines, variants, and partition layout templates for QC checks.
product_lines.select_line: Select a product line to view its variants and partition templates.
product_lines.line_dialog_desc: Define a product line with its order number pattern.
product_lines.name: Name
product_lines.pattern_hint: Order number prefix (e.g. ЭЛ00-######, ЛЕ00-######). Use # for digits, * for any characters.
product_lines.no_variants: No variants configured for this line.
product_lines.variant_dialog_desc: Configure disk size range and partition layout template.
product_lines.confirm_delete_line_desc: This will deactivate the product line and all its variants. This action can be undone.
product_lines.confirm_delete_variant_des: This will deactivate this variant and its partition template.
auth.session_expired: Session expired. Please log in again.
settings.session_desc: Configure admin session timeout and inactivity limits.
settings.session_timeout_desc: Maximum session lifetime before forced re-login.
settings.smtp_desc: Configure email delivery for notifications and alerts.
settings.smtp_enabled_desc: Send email alerts for activation failures, key exhaustion, etc.
settings.smtp_auth_desc: Most SMTP servers require username/password authentication.
settings.smtp_password_hint: For Gmail, use an App Password. Stored encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM).
settings.smtp_on_fail_desc: Send alert when a key activation fails.
settings.smtp_on_exhausted_desc: Send alert when available keys run out.
settings.smtp_on_summary_desc: Send a daily digest of activation activity.
downloads.title: Client Downloads
downloads.description: Download tools and extensions for technician workstations
downloads.oem_launcher_desc: CMD launcher for technician workstations — admin rights, WSUS cleanup, PS7 bootstrap
downloads.ps7_installer_desc: MSI installer for the PowerShell 7 runtime required by the activation script
downloads.chrome_extension_desc: Browser extension for collecting hardware info from client machines via WebGL/API
downloads.upload_prompt: Upload this resource to make it available for download
downloads.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this resource? It will no longer be available for download.
upgrade.title: System Upgrade
upgrade.upload_desc: Upload a .zip upgrade package containing manifest.json, migrations, and file updates.
upgrade.upload_hint: Drop a .zip upgrade package here, or click to browse
upgrade.upload_format: ZIP must contain manifest.json at root level
upgrade.fix_and_retry: Fix issues above and re-run checks
upgrade.backup_desc: Full database and file backup before any changes are made.
upgrade.apply_desc: Run database migrations and update application files.
upgrade.apply_warning: This will modify database schema and application files.
upgrade.apply_ensure: Ensure no technicians are actively using the system.
upgrade.apply_confirm: This will modify database schema and application files. A full backup has been created. Continue?
upgrade.verify_desc: Verify that the upgrade was applied correctly.
upgrade.rollback_confirm: This will restore the database and files from the pre-upgrade backup. All changes from this upgrade will be reverted.
upgrade.github_desc: Check for the latest release on GitHub.
upgrade.no_package: No upgrade package attached to this release
settings.client_tasks_desc: Toggle which tasks the launcher runs before activation.
settings.task_wsus_cleanup_desc: Clean Windows Update registry, restart service, trigger scan
settings.task_security_hardening_desc: Disable SMB guest access, enable SMB signing
settings.task_edrive_format_desc: Detect BIOS-labeled E: partition and format as FAT32
settings.task_ps7_install_desc: Search USB for MSI, fall back to winget if not found
settings.task_self_update_desc: Check server for newer launcher version and auto-replace
settings.client_timing_desc: Configure base delays and retry behavior for activation.
settings.client_network_desc: Configure latency thresholds and multipliers for adaptive timing.
settings.client_retry_desc: Configure how the system handles activation failures and key exhaustion.
settings.max_keys_to_try_desc: Number of different keys to request before giving up
settings.server_busy_delay_desc: Wait when Microsoft servers are throttling
settings.network_error_retries_desc: Extra reconnection attempts on network errors
settings.skip_key_on_invalid_desc: Immediately try next key when current key is blocked/invalid
settings.skip_key_on_service_desc: Try next key instead of retrying on Windows service errors
license.title: License
license.description: Manage your KeyGate license and feature access.
license.not_registered: No license registered — using Community tier
license.register_desc: Paste your license key to unlock Pro or Enterprise features.
license.deactivate_desc: This will revert to Community tier. Pro features will be disabled.
license.dev_desc: Generate test licenses for development. Only available on localhost.
license.purchase_desc: Choose the payment method that works for your region.
license.intl_payment_desc: Pay with credit card, PayPal, or other international methods. Instant license delivery.
license.ru_payment_desc: Due to international payment restrictions, Russian and CIS companies can purchase via bank transfer (wire transfer). We accept payments in RUB, USD, or EUR to our business account.
license.ru_payment_methods: Accepted: bank wire transfer, USDT/BTC, payment through Turkish or UAE intermediary banks.
sub.title: Subscription
sub.description: Manage your KeyGate subscription, payment method, and license.
sub.free_tier: Free tier — limited to 1 technician and 50 keys
sub.expiring_soon: Your subscription expires soon. Renew to keep Pro features.
sub.intl_payment_desc: Pay with credit card, PayPal, or other international methods. Instant license delivery.
sub.intl_note: After payment, you will receive a license key via email. Paste it in the License Key tab.
sub.ru_payment_desc: Due to international payment restrictions, Russian and CIS companies can purchase via bank transfer. We accept RUB, USD, or EUR.
sub.ru_note: After payment confirmation, we will send your license key within 1 business day.
sub.deactivate_desc: This will revert to Community tier. Pro features will be disabled.
sub.register_desc: Paste the JWT license key you received after payment.
sub.dev_desc: Generate test licenses for development. Only available on localhost.
sub.billing_note: For detailed payment history, check your GitHub Sponsors dashboard or contact sales@keygate.dev
sub.no_billing: No billing history. You are on the free Community tier.
sub.lemon_desc: Credit card, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay. Works worldwide. Instant license delivery.
sub.github_desc: Subscribe through GitHub. Great if you already have a GitHub account.
settings.languages_desc: Enable or disable languages available in the admin panel. English is always enabled as fallback.
pipeline.title: Task Pipeline
pipeline.drag_hint: Reorder tasks using arrows. Tasks run top-to-bottom during activation.
pipeline.no_tasks: No tasks configured. Add tasks from the library below.
pipeline.add_hint: Click a task to add it to the pipeline
pipeline.library_desc: Global task templates available for all product lines
pipeline.delete_template_desc: This will remove the template and unassign it from all product lines.
